title: GoPDF.js
subtitle: Local PDF processing for browser and Node — @gopdfjs/* npm packages plus gopdf-cli for the terminal.

local.title: Private by default
local.description: PDF bytes are processed in the browser Worker or on your machine — no upload pipeline required.

npm.title: npm + CLI delivery
npm.description: Each tool ships as a public @gopdfjs/* API and a matching gopdf-cli subcommand.

browserNode.title: Browser and Node
browserNode.description: Use createBrowserGopdf() in apps or createNodeGopdf() in scripts with the same engine API.

cli.title: Terminal without a UI
cli.description: Install gopdf-cli when you want compress, repair, or MCP integration without embedding the library.

quickStart.title: Quick start (browser)
quickStart.description: Build WASM once in the monorepo, then import the browser adapter in your app.
